case_title: SOROKIN, GIDEON TRUSTEE OF THE SOROKIN TRUST vs. WILSON, ANDREW LEE et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOROKIN, GIDEON TRUSTEE OF THE SOROKIN TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, ANDREW LEE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOROKIN, GIDEON TRUSTEE OF THE SOROKIN TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILSON, ANDREW LEE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 550 FELL ST #1, LEASE FORFEITED, INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES. [CCP 415.46]
